description: Same group definitions and per-group `ratio`s as parity_aware_config_grouped_downstream.json, with per-group `quota_bytes` added so the configured corpus fits in a 450 GB SLURM node when used by the hybrid+window variant. Quota = 0.70 x sum-of-on-disk-parquet-bytes per family. Preserves the original family-share distribution bit-for-bit (every family is shrunk by the same factor 0.70). Rationale and derivation: see TOKENIZER_TRAINING.md sec 6.3. | _tuned: European ratios x1.2 (germanic/romance/baltic/celtic/uralic/slavic); removed kas_Deva,lij_Latn (data quality); regrouped ydd_Hebr,knc_Arab,kas_Arab,uzs_Arab -> semitic (script-aware).
